item.name: Barb of Exile
item.description:
A variety of seahorse living in the deepest part of the Ruby Sea.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The signature mineral barbs lining this wavekin's back were ossified in the scorching heat of the deep waters near Hells' Lid. Its skin is nigh impregnable, and those who attempt to prey upon it are oft left with broken teeth for their efforts.
